title: Trip Support
description: Travel assistance platform for business and leisure travelers.
content:
## Overview

Trip Support offers comprehensive travel assistance services for travelers worldwide.

## Challenge

They needed a platform to manage travel bookings, emergency assistance, and customer support.

## Solution

We built a comprehensive web application with booking management, real-time chat support, and integrated payment processing.

## Results

- 10,000+ monthly active users
- 24/7 support availability
- Seamless booking experience
